We are recruiting to fill the position below:

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Logistics Personnel",
  "description": "Stellar International Company Limited - This company is a subsidiary of RSIN Group which entered Africa in 2008. Stellar International Co. Ltd has three businesses, namely Recycling Ant, Ant Express and Antshop Online.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Personnel

Job Location:&nbsp;Mowe, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Coordinate and assign drivers to delivery schedules and routes
	Monitor driver activities and ensure timely pickup and delivery of goods
	Maintain constant communication with drivers to track progress and resolve issues
	Ensure proper documentation of trips, deliveries, and logistics records
	Handle and resolve operational issues such as delays, breakdowns, or emergencies
	Provide regular updates and reports on logistics activities.


Education &amp; Experience


	Minimum of an OND / HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Logistics, Business Administration, or related fields
	Minimum of 1 year of experience in logistics, dispatch, or transportation operations
	Strong organizational and communication skills
	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple tasks effectively
	Basic knowledge of logistics operations and route planning
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office or logistics tracking systems is an added advantage.


Remuneration


	Basic Salary: N100,000 monthly
	Additional Benefits: Performance-based bonuses and incentives
	Negotiation: Salary is open to negotiation based on experience and competence.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to:&nbsp;joachinjephmiriam@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Logistics Personnel Job at Stellar International Company Limited




        
    

        
        Stellar International Company Limited - This company is a subsidiary of RSIN Group which entered Africa in 2008. Stellar International Co. Ltd has three businesses, namely Recycling Ant, Ant Express and Antshop Online.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Personnel

Job Location: Mowe, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Coordinate and assign drivers to delivery schedules and routes
	Monitor driver activities and ensure timely pickup and delivery of goods
	Maintain constant communication with drivers to track progress and resolve issues
	Ensure proper documentation of trips, deliveries, and logistics records
	Handle and resolve operational issues such as delays, breakdowns, or emergencies
	Provide regular updates and reports on logistics activities.


Education & Experience


	Minimum of an OND / HND / Bachelor’s Degree in Logistics, Business Administration, or related fields
	Minimum of 1 year of experience in logistics, dispatch, or transportation operations
	Strong organizational and communication skills
	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple tasks effectively
	Basic knowledge of logistics operations and route planning
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office or logistics tracking systems is an added advantage.


Remuneration


	Basic Salary: N100,000 monthly
	Additional Benefits: Performance-based bonuses and incentives
	Negotiation: Salary is open to negotiation based on experience and competence.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing Officer",
  "description": "M-KOPA is a fast-growing FinTech company offering millions of underbanked customers across Africa access to life-enhancing products and services. From our roots as the pioneer in pay-as-you-go &ldquo;PayGo&rsquo;&rdquo; solar energy for off grid homes, we have grown into one of the most advanced connected asset financing platforms in the world, empowering a broad range of customers to achieve progress in their lives.


We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Officer

Job Location: Lagos&nbsp;



Role Overview


	We are looking for a Marketing Officer to join our Marketing team; as we scale up and drive digital and financial inclusion across our markets.
	We&rsquo;re looking for a Marketing Coordinator to support our Nigeria operations. Reporting to the Marketing Operations Manager, you&rsquo;ll play a key role in enabling marketing execution across multiple functions &mdash; including Sales, Retail, Retention, and Warehouse.
	This is a highly operational role where coordination, organization, and attention to detail directly influence how effectively our marketing strategy comes to life on the ground.


What You&rsquo;ll Do


	Supporting the execution of marketing events and activations &mdash; from product launches to promotions and trade exhibitions &mdash; ensuring everything runs smoothly and aligns with the broader marketing strategy.
	Managing marketing materials and brand presence across service centres, retail shops, and partner locations &mdash; keeping assets up to date and ensuring strict adherence to brand guidelines.
	Owning marketing stock coordination &mdash; tracking inventory, distributing materials to teams, monitoring usage, and ensuring timely replenishment in collaboration with internal stakeholders.
	Maintaining and updating marketing calendars, while supporting planning cycles and ensuring teams stay aligned on upcoming activities.
	Conducting regular marketing audits to ensure consistency, quality, and compliance across all touchpoints.
	Partnering with the creative team to ensure timely delivery of marketing assets and following through guaranteed distribution and on-ground availability.
	Supporting research and performance tracking efforts &mdash; helping measure the effectiveness of marketing initiatives and sharing insights that inform future decisions.
	Managing and updating social media channels with product information, promotions, and engaging content to drive awareness and customer engagement.


What You&rsquo;ll Need


	A Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in a relevant field, with exposure to marketing, project management, or administration as a plus.
	2+ years of experience in marketing coordination, administration, or a similar operational role where you&rsquo;ve managed multiple priorities and stakeholders.
	Strong organizational and project management skills, with the ability to juggle multiple workstreams without losing attention to detail.
	Confidence in communication; both written and verbal and the ability to work effectively across different teams.
	A process-driven mindset, with solid administrative discipline and a bias for structure and follow-through.
	Comfort working in a fast-paced, evolving environment where priorities can shift quickly.



&nbsp;",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-04",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-05",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {

Marketing Officer Job at M-KOPA Nigeria




        
    

        
        M-KOPA is a fast-growing FinTech company offering millions of underbanked customers across Africa access to life-enhancing products and services. From our roots as the pioneer in pay-as-you-go “PayGo’” solar energy for off grid homes, we have grown into one of the most advanced connected asset financing platforms in the world, empowering a broad range of customers to achieve progress in their lives.


We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Marketing Officer

Job Location: Lagos 



Role Overview


	We are looking for a Marketing Officer to join our Marketing team; as we scale up and drive digital and financial inclusion across our markets.
	We’re looking for a Marketing Coordinator to support our Nigeria operations. Reporting to the Marketing Operations Manager, you’ll play a key role in enabling marketing execution across multiple functions — including Sales, Retail, Retention, and Warehouse.
	This is a highly operational role where coordination, organization, and attention to detail directly influence how effectively our marketing strategy comes to life on the ground.


What You’ll Do


	Supporting the execution of marketing events and activations — from product launches to promotions and trade exhibitions — ensuring everything runs smoothly and aligns with the broader marketing strategy.
	Managing marketing materials and brand presence across service centres, retail shops, and partner locations — keeping assets up to date and ensuring strict adherence to brand guidelines.
	Owning marketing stock coordination — tracking inventory, distributing materials to teams, monitoring usage, and ensuring timely replenishment in collaboration with internal stakeholders.
	Maintaining and updating marketing calendars, while supporting planning cycles and ensuring teams stay aligned on upcoming activities.
	Conducting regular marketing audits to ensure consistency, quality, and compliance across all touchpoints.
	Partnering with the creative team to ensure timely delivery of marketing assets and following through guaranteed distribution and on-ground availability.
	Supporting research and performance tracking efforts — helping measure the effectiveness of marketing initiatives and sharing insights that inform future decisions.
	Managing and updating social media channels with product information, promotions, and engaging content to drive awareness and customer engagement.


What You’ll Need


	A Bachelor’s Degree in a relevant field, with exposure to marketing, project management, or administration as a plus.
	2+ years of experience in marketing coordination, administration, or a similar operational role where you’ve managed multiple priorities and stakeholders.
	Strong organizational and project management skills, with the ability to juggle multiple workstreams without losing attention to detail.
	Confidence in communication; both written and verbal and the ability to work effectively across different teams.
	A process-driven mindset, with solid administrative discipline and a bias for structure and follow-through.
	Comfort working in a fast-paced, evolving environment where priorities can shift quickly.



     

    

        Click here to Apply

The product is offered to retail clients (both individually and via associations and cooperatives schemes), small and medium- sized enterprises and small corporate.&nbsp;An active collaboration of the agency is required to structure the transaction and ensure prevention of over-indebtedness by implementing checks on the client&rsquo;s disposable income. To facilitate repayments, these are made directly from source.

This innovative scheme has so far provided access to equipment finance to close to 25,000 Nigerians. Typical assets which Aquila finances under this scheme are motorcycles, tricycles, laptops, refrigerators, freezers, and generators which support the generation of additional income to supplement the incomes of lower-ranking Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Details


	Calendar management: organize and maintain executives&rsquo; schedules, including appointments, meetings, and travel arrangements.
	Communication: act as a liaison between executives and stakeholders, handling incoming calls, emails, and correspondence.
	Documentation: prepare, edit, and manage reports, presentations, and other documents as needed.
	Meeting coordination: schedule and organize meetings, including preparing agendas, taking minutes, and following up on action items.
	Office management: ensure the office is organized and supplies are maintained; handle administrative tasks like filing and record-keeping.
	Project support: assist with special projects and initiatives, coordinating logistics and resources.


Qualifications


	Candidates should possess a University Degree&nbsp;with 3-5 years experience.
	Experience in resolving issues, managing internal and customers.
	Excellent written, verbal, analytical and communication skills.


Knowledge / Experience:


	Advanced Microsoft Office skills, Power point skills and the ability to become familiar with firm-specific programs and software
	Exceptional presentation and reporting skills
	Strong organizational, project management and problem-solving skills with impeccable multi-tasking abilities
	Exceptional interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in collaboration and delegation of duties
	Great time management skills


Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to:&nbsp;humancapital@aquilagroupng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Secretary Job at Aquila Partners




        
    

        
        Aquila introduced the finance lease product at the origination of the company in 2005 and has since then developed tailor-made solutions for its diverse customer segments. The product is offered to retail clients (both individually and via associations and cooperatives schemes), small and medium- sized enterprises and small corporate. An active collaboration of the agency is required to structure the transaction and ensure prevention of over-indebtedness by implementing checks on the client’s disposable income. To facilitate repayments, these are made directly from source.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



This innovative scheme has so far provided access to equipment finance to close to 25,000 Nigerians. Typical assets which Aquila finances under this scheme are motorcycles, tricycles, laptops, refrigerators, freezers, and generators which support the generation of additional income to supplement the incomes of lower-ranking Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Details


	Calendar management: organize and maintain executives’ schedules, including appointments, meetings, and travel arrangements.
	Communication: act as a liaison between executives and stakeholders, handling incoming calls, emails, and correspondence.
	Documentation: prepare, edit, and manage reports, presentations, and other documents as needed.
	Meeting coordination: schedule and organize meetings, including preparing agendas, taking minutes, and following up on action items.
	Office management: ensure the office is organized and supplies are maintained; handle administrative tasks like filing and record-keeping.
	Project support: assist with special projects and initiatives, coordinating logistics and resources.


Qualifications


	Candidates should possess a University Degree with 3-5 years experience.
	Experience in resolving issues, managing internal and customers.
	Excellent written, verbal, analytical and communication skills.


Knowledge / Experience:


	Advanced Microsoft Office skills, Power point skills and the ability to become familiar with firm-specific programs and software
	Exceptional presentation and reporting skills
	Strong organizational, project management and problem-solving skills with impeccable multi-tasking abilities
	Exceptional interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in collaboration and delegation of duties
	Great time management skills


Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Manager - Meter Engineering",
  "description": "Beacon Power Services has been on the forefront of developing energy management software and providing energy analytics in Nigeria since 2010.

We are recruiting t o fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Manager - Meter Engineering

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Department: OPS &ndash; Operations
Unit: FOP &ndash; Field Operations
Reports to: Director &ndash; Field Operations
Work arrangement: Work will be delivered on-site at the client&rsquo;s location / in the field

How You&#39;ll Make an Impact


	We are looking for a technically sharp Manager &ndash; Meter Engineering with strong project management capabilities&nbsp;to lead the deployment, performance, and reliability of metering infrastructure across BPS client network.
	The role is responsible for overseeing the proper installation, maintenance, calibration, and optimization of electricity meters that support grid visibility, energy analytics, and revenue assurance.
	The role works closely with clients to ensure metering infrastructure is deployed and operated to high technical and operational standards.&nbsp;


What You&#39;ll Do
Metering Infrastructure Management:


	Oversee the installation, commissioning, and maintenance of electricity meters across BPS client networks
	Ensure meters are properly configured, calibrated, and operational to support accurate data collection and billing integrity
	Support the deployment of smart meters and AMI devices in coordination with engineering and product teams
	Implement preventive maintenance and inspection schedules for metering equipment


Technical Oversight:


	Ensure client field teams follow standard procedures for installation, maintenance, and troubleshooting
	Support the coordination of installation schedules, site access, and logistics for meter deployments
	Investigate meter faults, installation issues, and communication failures
	Support client field teams in diagnosing and resolving technical issues on site
	Enforce safety standards and operational best practices


Data Quality &amp; System Integration:


	Monitor meter data quality and communication performance
	Escalate and coordinate resolution of data or connectivity issues with internal technical teams
	Ensure proper integration of meter installations with BPS platforms and utility systems


Compliance &amp; Quality Assurance:


	Ensure field activities comply with metering standards, safety requirements, and operational guidelines
	Maintain installation records, technical documentation, and field reports
	Conduct periodic checks of installations and equipment performance


What We&#39;re Looking For
Professional &amp; Technical Strengths:


	Strong practical experience in metering operations or electrical engineering within a utility, metering provider, or power distribution environment
	Solid understanding of electricity meters, smart metering systems, and AMI infrastructure
	Experience with meter installation, commissioning, calibration, and troubleshooting in field environments
	Good understanding of distribution networks, feeder monitoring, and energy measurement at transformer or feeder level
	Experience working with or supervising field technicians, contractors, or installation teams
	Familiarity with meter communication systems and data collection processes


Leadership &amp; Interpersonal Strengths:


	Ability to collaborate with multicultural and geographically distributed teams
	High degree of autonomy and accountability
	Willingness to travel within and outside the country
	Proven ability to coordinate activities across multiple sites and stakeholders
	Comfortable engaging with client technical teams, utility engineers, and field personnel
	Highly organized and execution-oriented, with strong attention to operational detail
	Clear and structured communicator, able to document activities and escalate technical issues effectively
	Proactive and solution-driven, with the ability to diagnose problems and implement practical solutions


Nice to Have:


	Experience working with SCADA systems, Meter Data Management (MDM), or AMI platforms
	Familiarity with meter communication protocols (e.g., DLMS/COSEM)
	Exposure to data monitoring or visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, or similar platforms)
	Experience supporting meter deployments, network visibility projects, or loss reduction initiatives.


What the Recruitment Process Looks Like


	Step 1 - Application Review: Our Talent Acquisition team will review your application to evaluate your experience, qualifications, and overall suitability for the role.
	Step 2 - Behavioral &amp; Cognitive Assessments: If selected to move forward, you will complete behavioral and cognitive assessments. These help us better understand your working style and ensure alignment with the role requirements and BPS&#39;s culture.
	Step 3 - Technical Assessments: If you progress to this stage, you will complete technical assessments designed to evaluate your problem-solving approach and the key technical skills required for the role.
	Step 4 - HR &amp; Culture Fit Interview: At this stage, you will meet with our Talent Acquisition team to discuss your background, motivations, and potential fit within the company.
	Step 5 - Technical Excellence Interview: In the final stage, you will interview with the Hiring team to further assess your technical expertise and overall fit for the role, and to ensure alignment on expectations from both sides.

Manager - Meter Engineering Job at Beacon Power Services




        
    

        
        Beacon Power Services has been on the forefront of developing energy management software and providing energy analytics in Nigeria since 2010.

We are recruiting t o fill the position below:

Job Position: Manager - Meter Engineering

Job Location: Lagos
Department: OPS – Operations
Unit: FOP – Field Operations
Reports to: Director – Field Operations
Work arrangement: Work will be delivered on-site at the client’s location / in the field

How You'll Make an Impact
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a technically sharp Manager – Meter Engineering with strong project management capabilities to lead the deployment, performance, and reliability of metering infrastructure across BPS client network.
	The role is responsible for overseeing the proper installation, maintenance, calibration, and optimization of electricity meters that support grid visibility, energy analytics, and revenue assurance.
	The role works closely with clients to ensure metering infrastructure is deployed and operated to high technical and operational standards. 


What You'll Do
Metering Infrastructure Management:


	Oversee the installation, commissioning, and maintenance of electricity meters across BPS client networks
	Ensure meters are properly configured, calibrated, and operational to support accurate data collection and billing integrity
	Support the deployment of smart meters and AMI devices in coordination with engineering and product teams
	Implement preventive maintenance and inspection schedules for metering equipment


Technical Oversight:


	Ensure client field teams follow standard procedures for installation, maintenance, and troubleshooting
	Support the coordination of installation schedules, site access, and logistics for meter deployments
	Investigate meter faults, installation issues, and communication failures
	Support client field teams in diagnosing and resolving technical issues on site
	Enforce safety standards and operational best practices


Data Quality & System Integration:


	Monitor meter data quality and communication performance
	Escalate and coordinate resolution of data or connectivity issues with internal technical teams
	Ensure proper integration of meter installations with BPS platforms and utility systems


Compliance & Quality Assurance:


	Ensure field activities comply with metering standards, safety requirements, and operational guidelines
	Maintain installation records, technical documentation, and field reports
	Conduct periodic checks of installations and equipment performance


What We're Looking For
Professional & Technical Strengths:


	Strong practical experience in metering operations or electrical engineering within a utility, metering provider, or power distribution environment
	Solid understanding of electricity meters, smart metering systems, and AMI infrastructure
	Experience with meter installation, commissioning, calibration, and troubleshooting in field environments
	Good understanding of distribution networks, feeder monitoring, and energy measurement at transformer or feeder level
	Experience working with or supervising field technicians, contractors, or installation teams
	Familiarity with meter communication systems and data collection processes


Leadership & Interpersonal Strengths:


	Ability to collaborate with multicultural and geographically distributed teams
	High degree of autonomy and accountability
	Willingness to travel within and outside the country
	Proven ability to coordinate activities across multiple sites and stakeholders
	Comfortable engaging with client technical teams, utility engineers, and field personnel
	Highly organized and execution-oriented, with strong attention to operational detail
	Clear and structured communicator, able to document activities and escalate technical issues effectively
	Proactive and solution-driven, with the ability to diagnose problems and implement practical solutions


Nice to Have:


	Experience working with SCADA systems, Meter Data Management (MDM), or AMI platforms
	Familiarity with meter communication protocols (e.g., DLMS/COSEM)
	Exposure to data monitoring or visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, or similar platforms)
	Experience supporting meter deployments, network visibility projects, or loss reduction initiatives.


What the Recruitment Process Looks Like


	Step 1 - Application Review: Our Talent Acquisition team will review your application to evaluate your experience, qualifications, and overall suitability for the role.
	Step 2 - Behavioral & Cognitive Assessments: If selected to move forward, you will complete behavioral and cognitive assessments. These help us better understand your working style and ensure alignment with the role requirements and BPS's culture.
	Step 3 - Technical Assessments: If you progress to this stage, you will complete technical assessments designed to evaluate your problem-solving approach and the key technical skills required for the role.
	Step 4 - HR & Culture Fit Interview: At this stage, you will meet with our Talent Acquisition team to discuss your background, motivations, and potential fit within the company.
	Step 5 - Technical Excellence Interview: In the final stage, you will interview with the Hiring team to further assess your technical expertise and overall fit for the role, and to ensure alignment on expectations from both sides.
